content: Illustrative Morningstar DBRS-style issuer credit assessment for Helios Utilities, dated 2025-11-15 on Q3 fundamentals as of 2025-09-30. This assessment takes a standalone, sector-conservative view and does not apply a parent-support uplift, landing two notches below the other anchor at BBB (low). The leverage and interest-coverage inputs are effectively identical to the peer assessment; the entire divergence is attributable to methodology treatment of group support.
disclaimer: Synthetic, illustrative — not Morningstar DBRS data.
